# Keyboard Input

> Keyboard input capture and key state tracking

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

Keyboard input capture and key state tracking

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Key State Detection** — when Check if key is pressed is requested, then Check if key is pressed completed.
- **Key Events** — when Receive key press/release signals is requested, then Receive key press/release signals completed.
- **Key Modifiers** — when Detect Shift, Ctrl, Alt, etc. is requested, then Detect Shift, Ctrl, Alt, etc. completed.
- **Raw Input** — when Access raw keyboard input is requested, then Access raw keyboard input completed.
